metadata.description: Claude Code plugin for cmux — the native macOS terminal built on Ghostty. Browser automation, split panes, agent spawning, Agent Teams support, and sidebar metadata.

plugins.name: cmux-claude-code-skill
plugins.description: Gives Claude the ability to control cmux: open browser tiles, spawn agents in splits, manage workspaces, automate the embedded WebKit browser, coordinate worktree-based parallel development, send notifications, and update sidebar metadata.
